title: astragalus guttatus
intro: Astragalus guttatus, also known as the spotted milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, native to the high-altitude mountain ranges of the Tibetan Plateau and the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus guttatus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus guttatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, with the dried root and rhizome being commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and modern herbal remedies.
